ltx_related.title: i2v LF MF v2v LTXV Preprocess

analysis_notes: Root graph is primarily an ORCHESTRATION shell (Set/Get bus, switches, muter, loaders).
Heavy LTX compute lives in subgraph(s), not only root nodes.
Comfy node mode: 0=ALWAYS active, 2=NEVER muted, 4=BYPASS — Orchestrator/switches flip these.
[[P:...]] titles are the public ports the user (and any API driver) must feed per mode.
Agent mini-graphs that only do LoadAudio->Encode->Concat are NOT equivalent to AIO Audio input routing.

Set/Get bus vars: ['m audio in', 'm audio v2v', 'm clip length', 'm fps', 'm frame  first', 'm frame last', 'm frame mid', 'm hight', 'm img com', 'm model', 'm model upscale', 'm neg', 'm noise', 'm pos', 'm sampler', 'm vae audio', 'm vae preview', 'm vae video', 'm video', 'm video info', 'm width']
